name: config resolve-path returns the root ctp.config.yaml as the active config when it is present
command: printf 'name: x\nextends: [standard]\n' > ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" resolve-path --root . 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'ctp.config.yaml' && echo resolve-prefers-root-config 1>&2
